practicals.title: Study locally available common flowering plants (Solanaceae)
practicals.details: Dissection and display of floral whorls, anther and ovary to show number of chambers; type of root, stem, leaf arrangement

practicals.title: Preparation and study of T.S. of dicot and monocot roots and stems
practicals.unit_name: Structural Organization in Plants and Animals

practicals.title: Study of osmosis by potato osmometer
practicals.details: Experiment on endosmosis in raisins or potato osmometer

practicals.title: Study of plasmolysis in epidermal peels
practicals.details: Using Rhoeo/lily leaves or onion bulb scale leaves

practicals.title: Study of distribution of stomata on upper and lower surfaces of leaves
Comparative study of the rates of transpiration in upper and lower surfaces of leaves
Test for presence of sugar, starch, proteins and fats
practicals.details: In suitable plant and animal materials

practicals.title: Separation of plant pigments through paper chromatography
Study of the rate of respiration in flower buds/leaf tissue and germinating seeds
Test for presence of urea, sugar, albumin, bile salts in urine
Study the plant population density by quadrat method
Study the plant population frequency by quadrat method
Prepare a temporary mount of onion root tip to study mitosis
Isolate DNA from available plant material
practicals.details: Using spinach, green pea seeds, papaya, banana etc.
